=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 4/18/03, Dallas, TX, Granada Theater, 2CDR

Taper and lineage: no info
wind noise during all the recording, in particular way after the track 6
Great sound

CD1

1 intro 2 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 3 Tell Me That It Isn't True (Bob on piano and Larry on pedal steel), 4 Tombstone Blues (Bob on piano), 5 Saving Grace (Bob on harp and piano, Larry on pedal steel), 6 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano), 7 Just Like A Woman (Bob on harp and piano, Larry on pedal steel), 8 Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp), 9 Never Gonna Be The Same Again (Larry on pedal steel), 10 Dignity (Bob on harp and piano),

CD2

1 Easy Lovin' (song by Freddie Hart) (Bob on piano), 2 Bye And Bye (Bob on harp and piano, Tony on standup bass), 3 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar), 4 Standing In The Doorway (Bob on piano and electric guitar), 5 Summer Days (Bob on piano and electric guitar, Tony on standup bass), 6 (encore), 7 Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano), 8 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano), 9 short 



Concert # 1502 of The Never-Ending Tour. First concert of the 2003 US Spring Tour. 2003 concert # 12.
First concert with the 16th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal), Freddie Koella (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Receli (drums & percussion).

1-6, 9-16 Bob Dylan (piano).
2, 4. 6, 8 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
4, 6, 7, 9, 11 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
7,8 Bob Dylan (guitar).
12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).

Notes
First live rendition of Dignity since Helsingborg, Sweden, 1 July 2001.
Live debut of Easy Lovin.
